summary: Full skill utilization audit: (1) Fixed 8 broken tier_1 wirings by removing phantom skill refs. (2) Added triggers to 21 zero-trigger skills in registry.json. (3) Wired opencode-beads@0.6.0: registry entry, compound-engineering enabled+category, tool-tiers tier_1. (4) Built packages/opencode-registry-bridge/: generate-entries.mjs + merge-to-registry.mjs to auto-bridge packages/ packages to registry.json. Registry: 92->107 skills. (5) Removed 16 phantom tier_2 hints and 4 empty tier_1 categories. (6) Added 39 tier_2 skill_hints for skills missing tier_1+tier_2 coverage. (7) Fixed tier_1>tier_2 overlap: removed 20 tier_1 skills from tier_2 (tier_2: 87->62). (8) Removed 3 redundant tier_1 categories (debugging, testing, sequential_reasoning). (9) Wired RL promotion state persistence via scripts/preload-state-persist.mjs. (10) Created skill exercise playbook: 7 prompts for comprehensive skill coverage + real work.
